_comment: Bundled starter catalog for fresh Docker installs. Read by server/index.js seedFirstRun() when populating a new bus/_registry.json. Keep in sync with the live installation catalog when new modules ship.

available_modules.summary: Goals → Initiatives → Packages → Tasks. Pattern #12 campaigns, BUDGET-ALLOCATION, Trust Cycle. The default operating discipline for any BU.
available_modules.detail: Ships with a strategy Stewart instance per BU. Runs the universal planning loop: set goals, break them into time-bound campaigns, ship them, learn. Includes Planning · KPIs · Learning · Inputs · Outputs surfaces. Sister archetype for Finance / Marketing / Ops modules to coordinate against.
when_useful: You keep asking your agent for status updates on Goals / Initiatives / Campaigns
You want a canonical planning loop rather than reinventing structure per venture
The BU has more than one active workstream and coordination is starting to hurt
You want the Trust Cycle to run — the Stewart earns envelope over time
when_not_useful: The BU is single-person exploratory work with no cross-cutting plan yet
You already run planning entirely in Notion / Linear and are not looking to move it
You just want a task list — the Stewart pattern is heavier than that
install_signals: Recurring questions about what to work on next
Requests to break big goals into smaller steps
Repeated planning-shaped conversations without a home
User asking "am I making progress?" more than 2x in a week
example_intents: What campaign should I be running this week?
What did we ship this cycle? What slipped?
Where is my time going relative to the plan?
available_modules.purpose_line: Set the direction, watch the KPIs, run the cycle

available_modules.summary: Cash / Runway / Costs / Revenue dashboards on top of Moneybird. Narrow recommendation surface + investor view.
available_modules.detail: Ships with a Finance Stewart (Monitor variant) per BU. Read-only on bookkeeping; writes recommendations only. Two allowed categories: expense-recategorization + founder-draw-adjustment. silent-low-only ConfidenceFrame. Investor view via signed shareable URL. SPEC: docs/genus/modules/finance/SPEC_v1.md.
when_useful: You have a bookkeeping source (Moneybird) with actual transactions
Cash / runway questions recur — how many months, what if we cut X
You want a signed investor view that stays live without you rebuilding it
You want recommendations gated by silent-low-only confidence
when_not_useful: Pre-revenue with no accounts wired — recommendations have nothing to work from
You already run Finance elsewhere (Xero, QuickBooks native) and do not want a mirror
You want write-back to bookkeeping — this module is monitoring-only at v1
example_intents: How many months of runway do we have?
Which of my recurring costs is trending up?
Show me the investor view — I want to share the link.
available_modules.purpose_line: Track cash + runway, recommend narrow actions, expose investor view

available_modules.summary: Release-shaped sibling of Strategy. Vision → Roadmap by version → Releases + Design system + Decisions.
available_modules.detail: Operators install Product on any BU where they're building a product. On the genus BU specifically, Product is Genus's own roadmap (dogfooding). Surfaces: Products switcher · Vision (layered horizons + inputs + history) · Roadmap (kanban-by-version A + timeline B) · Backlog · Releases (list + detail) · Design system (Colors / Typography / Spacing / Components / Patterns / Icons) · Decisions (ADR viewer). v2 deferred: Module catalog. Per ADR-005.
when_useful: You are building a product with a real roadmap — versions, releases, campaigns
You want Vision / Roadmap / Backlog / Releases in one place instead of scattered docs
You want design system + decision log surfaces to stop drifting from real docs
Multiple people work on the product and need shared canonical release framing
when_not_useful: Single-person consulting work — no product to roadmap
Product decisions live in code + git and you do not want a parallel surface
You are pre-idea and roadmap structure would be premature
install_signals: Ad-hoc release-note writing without a canonical home
example_intents: What is on the roadmap for v0.9?
What did v0.8 actually ship, and what slipped?
Draft the release notes for v0.9.
available_modules.purpose_line: Keep catalogue, roadmap and releases current

available_modules.summary: Management view of how a venture builds. Test sweeps · bug practice · deploy cadence · synthetic data freshness. Not a replica of the dev team's tools — a health dashboard with links out.
available_modules.detail: Ships with Dev Stewart + 3 Masons (Test, Synthetic Data, Code Fix). Five workflows: pre-promotion test sweep, bug triage, synthetic data refresh, release readiness, deploy health watch. Overview adds a per-product × build-health matrix (when the Product module is installed). Audience is management — every leaf surface links to the actual dev tool of record (CI, Linear, GitHub Issues) rather than replicating it.
when_useful: The BU builds software and needs a management view of build-health
You want CI / bug / deploy state visible without opening 4 tools
You are running release-readiness sweeps and want the report to have a home
Multiple sub-products need one health matrix
when_not_useful: Non-software BU (services, physical goods) — build-health does not apply
You already have great dev tooling and do not want a Genus mirror
Solo dev with everything in your head — the surface adds overhead
install_signals: Bug-triage conversations without a canonical queue
example_intents: How healthy is CI across all my products?
What are the open bugs blocking v0.9?
Run the release-readiness sweep for v0.9.
available_modules.purpose_line: Watch build-health, gate releases, surface bugs and deploy risk

available_modules.summary: First-class Learning module. Structured experiments (commercial / infra / agent-interaction) with hypothesis + results + linked initiatives.
available_modules.detail: Promotes what today lives as learning_log[] entries on initiatives into a first-class module. Experiment types, results, learnings. Wires to Strategy (initiatives can link an experiment) and A/B orchestration (i47).
available_modules.purpose_line: Run experiments, capture what worked, decide by evidence
when_useful: You have hypotheses waiting to be tested
You want a home for what you tried and learned
Multiple experiments run in parallel and need coordination
when_not_useful: You test entirely in production and dont journal
You run zero experiments this quarter
install_signals: a/b test discussions with no home
retrospective questions like what did we learn last cycle
example_intents: what experiments are open?
did the pricing test move conversion?
close the stale experiments from last cycle

available_modules.summary: Agent scouting + hiring: browse archetype catalog, open reqs, propose candidates, A/B test top 2 before committing. Includes Claude plan optimiser sub-view.
available_modules.detail: HR Stewart owns the flow. Substrate: bus/{BU}/hr/openings.json + system/agent_catalog.json. Wires into i47 A/B for evaluate-before-hire. Plan optimiser (i50) sub-view tracks Max plan usage + fires jobs opportunistically.
available_modules.purpose_line: Find the right agent for the job, watch what the plan costs
when_useful: You want new Stewart archetypes without hand-crafting each
You need visibility into Claude plan usage
You want to A/B test candidates before committing
when_not_useful: You only use one agent and dont scout
example_intents: find me a marketing stewart
are we near the plan limit?
a/b two candidates on this task

available_modules.summary: Super-lightweight CRM. Pipeline + deals + contacts + touches. Paste-import for existing data. Inbound email auto-sync via forwarding.
available_modules.detail: One step beyond Excel/Miro. Configurable stages (default Lead / Qualified / Proposal / Won / Lost). Import flow decomposes pasted text into draft entries (same shape as i39 note-capture + i14 proposals). Cloudflare Email Worker at sales@genus.work receives operator-forwarded emails, matches from-address to contacts, logs touches. Wires linked_customer_area_id into business_areas.json.
available_modules.purpose_line: Track deals and touches; auto-log inbound emails
when_useful: You track deals in spreadsheets or Miro
You want inbound email auto-logged
No real CRM yet or looking to replace one
when_not_useful: You already run HubSpot / Pipedrive / Salesforce with disciplined use
example_intents: whats the state of the acme deal?
who havent we touched this month?
import these 20 leads i just talked to

available_modules.summary: Super-lightweight campaign tracker. Campaigns + content + metrics. Paste-import, wired to Learning experiments and Finance spend.
available_modules.detail: One step beyond Excel/Miro. Campaign register with goal/target/budget/status. Content-in-flight per campaign. metrics.jsonl for performance samples. linked_experiment_id makes every campaign an experiment by default (wired to i48). linked_area_id shows on Layers.
available_modules.purpose_line: Track what youre running, what its costing, what its learning
when_useful: You track campaigns in a Google Sheet or Notion
You want a home for content in flight
You want campaigns as experiments
when_not_useful: You already run everything in a real marketing suite (HubSpot Marketing, Marketo)
example_intents: whats in flight this month?
what did the Q4 push actually spend?
add this thread as a campaign
